printed.name: Bicycle

movement.exhale: Lower one leg toward Mat, create L shape, bend knee, flex hip bringing leg toward chest, straighten leg toward ceiling, simultaneously lower opposite leg, create L shape
movement.inhale: Lower top leg toward Mat, simutaneously bend knee, flex hip bringing leg toward chest, straighten leg toward ceiling, create L shape

cues: Establish L shape with legs in each cycle
Keep legs parallel avoiding hip external rotation
